original: Blood dribbles freely from the ragged wound.

Horribly unprotected as "+{var0}.getCombatName()+" "+({var1}?"are":"is")+", there’s nothing stopping the blade hitting a vein and the merlot to start flowing down your [pc.skinFurScales], dripping in the dirt below your [pc.feet].
